programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Based on the popular line of Mattel toys and the hit TV series, "Max Steel" is a teenage superhero for the next generation, combining action, comedy, and cutting edge special effects into an epic adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Mafia loan shark turned Hollywood Producer Chili Palmer in this sharp sequel to "Get Shorty." With an unbelievably hip all-star cast that also includes Uma Thurman, André 3000, Steve Tyler, Christina Milian and The Rock, and bursting with the hottest music in the biz.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: Boot up for suspense and high-powered excitement with Jonny Lee Miller and Angelina Jolie when a group of hackers, the rebels of the information age, find themselves embroiled in a plot that could destroy the world's ecosystems…or their own lives.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Natalie tries on her grandma's 'magical' wedding veil and is transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children. Is she finally ready to commit?

programme.title: The Silver Brumby
programme.desc: In the unforgiving wilderness of the Australian Alps, there roams a stallion like no other, the Silver Brumby. Now, one horseman sets off on an unforgettable adventure to capture the horse that according to legend, could never be tamed.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: Star Kid
programme.desc: An unpopular boy comes across a fallen meteor containing an alien cybersuit that turns him into the kind of kid he's always wanted to be.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A CIA operative's identity is leaked by the government as payback for an op-ed article her husband wrote.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: A Foreign Officer in London is forced to go on the run when she is framed for crimes she did not commit.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: It's a Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: It's A Boy Girl Thing is a brilliantly funny romantic comedy about next-door neighbours who live worlds apart. Woody Deane (Zegers) and Nell Bedworth (Armstrong) are life long sworn enemies who wake up one day to find themselves in a very strange place: each others bodies. In their switched identities, each sets out to destroy the other's high school reputation. When they start to succeed they get more than they bargained for. Sometimes falling in love can be an out of body experience.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: Everything changes for Eva when she receives a life insurance check accidentally made out for five million dollars instead of the expected fifty thousand dollars. She and her best friend take the money and head out for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: The Beat Beneath my Feet
programme.desc: With a School of Rock-esque vibe, this hilarious coming-of-age tale explores unconventional friendship in the most riotous way. When nerdy teen Tom meets rebellious American rock legend Max (Luke Perry), he knows this is his chance to fulfil his dreams. Tom agrees not to report the 'presumed dead' Max to the authorities...on the basis that he teaches him how to play guitar.

programme.title: Hot Air
programme.desc: A timely, slick, hilarious and heartfelt comedy-drama from Frank Coraci, director of The Wedding Singer, starring Steve Coogan (Stan & Ollie), Taylor Russell (Lost in Space) and Neve Campbell (Scream). Lionel is the king of conservative talk radio but when his 16-year-old niece, Tess (Taylor Russell: Lost in Space) shows up seeking help with a family crisis, will he agree to a new responsibility?

programme.title: It Had to Be You
programme.desc: Quirky, inventive and thoroughly romantic! Surprised by a sudden proposal and subsequent ultimatum from her easy-going boyfriend, Sonia, (Cristin Milioti: How I Met Your Mother, The Wolf of Wall Street) has to decide whether she'll join the ranks of her married friends or take a leap of faith and pursue her fantasies. A whimsical and touching romantic comedy that is delightful through and through!

programme.title: Time Runners
programme.desc: Special Agent Sally Biggs has a secret, she can rewind time - whenever she wants. It's enough to make her a celebrity at the FBI and control almost everything in her life. But when her scientist husband disappears mysteriously, paranormal apparitions begin to surround her before she discovers the terrifying truth.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Inspired by true historical events, this epic action thriller stars martial arts legend Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrian Brody. When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Chan), teams up his army with an mysterious elite Legion, led by General Lucius (Cusack), to protect his country. A tale of courage, friendship and honour.

programme.title: Planning For Joy
programme.desc: Small business owner Hazel hires charismatic Theo to help boost her public speaking. Can Theo's unconventional approach make Hazel become nature in front of the cameras or will she be lost for words?

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Ambitious intern Abby must find her boss a date. Is Abby up to the task so she can secure her dream job, or will one of the suitors be too perfect for her to let go? (2019)

programme.title: Written in The Stars
programme.desc: A journalist teams up with an astrology guru to write about a local meteor shower festival where they discover that love can be written in the stars. Starring Kimberley Crossman (2021)

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Playing For Keeps is a romantic comedy about a former soccer star who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy's soccer team.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is living her best life in NYC when she suddenly inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop and must return to her small hometown. There, she runs into her charming high school crush Cole Murphey, who helps her renovate the store.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic.

programme.title: The Confession
programme.desc: All her life, Katie Lapp (Katie LeClerc) has known no other world than that of the Amish family who raised her. But upon discovering that she was actually adopted from out of the "English" world, her quest for answers to her identity resulted in her being shunned by her people. Now in "The Confession," the thrilling sequel to "The Shunning," Katie is on an even greater quest--to be reunited before it is too late with her long-lost birth mother, Laura Mayfield (Sherry Stringfield), who is dying of cancer. Only the challenges of being Amish in an English world stand in her way... along with one man who has other plans for her biological mother's legacy.

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast
programme.desc: The classic Beauty and the Beast tale told with a twist! Isabelle is all beauty - on the outside. When she gets lost on a skiing vacation, she is helped by Jeremy, a man hiding from the world and his past. He's the first person to put Isabelle in her place, and Isabelle realizes she might be more beast than she wants to admit. Through Jeremy's influence she begins to change - and fall in love.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay-at-home mom takes in her struggling best friend to help her.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: V. C. Andrews' cult classic Lifetime Movie siblings hide post father's death.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade (Meagan Good) appears perfect but her life is far from idyllic behind doors.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A distant father (Kevin Sorbo) and a lost girlfriend to his best friend (Ben Davies) leads Nathan (Jason Burkey) on a journey of rediscovery.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Young divorce lawyer Kelsey finds it safer to keep love out of her life - that is until a stray dog pairs her with Harrison, the local vet.

programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: When unproduced Broadway playwright Skip Donahue (Gene Wilder) and his best friend, out-of-work actor Harry Monroe (Richard Pryor), are both fired from their dead-end jobs, they abandon Broadway and set out in their battered van to find fame and fortune in Hollywood. But the van breaks down on the way, and they're forced to take jobs as dancing woodpeckers in a bank promotion. Their troubles are just beginning, as their feathered costumes are swiped by a pair of hoods who use them in a holdup, and Skip and Harry are soon carted off to prison. There they try to keep their sanity and their lives as they deal with a sadistic warden, a hulking mass-murderer and the inter-prison rodeo, which may provide them with the opportunity to walk away -- but at a considerable sacrifice.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: Cops And Robbersons
programme.desc: Norman Robberson is a mild-mannered accountant who is addicted to TV cop shows. His dreams of playing "cops and robbers" comes to life when two cops move in to stake out the mobsters next door. When a no-nonsense cop meets the meddlesome Robberson family, his assignment becomes anything but routine!

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A convicted thief poses as a cop in order to retrieve a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Envy (2004)
programme.desc: Tim and Nick are best friends, neighbors, and co-workers, whose equal footing is suddenly tripped up when one of Nick's harebrained get-rich-quick schemes actually succeeds. Vapoizer, a spray that literally makes dog poop evaporate into thin air, to where exactly is anyone's guess. Tim, who had scoffed at Nick's idea and passed on an opportunity to get in on the deal, can only watch as Nick's fortune, and Tim's own envy, grow to equally outrageous proportions. When the flames of jealousy are fanned by an oddball drifter who imposes himself into the situation, Tim's life careens wildly out of control, taking Nick's with it.

programme.title: Belle Starr's Daughter
programme.desc: The daughter of famous outlaw Belle Starr arrives at the town where her mother was murdered to find her killer.

programme.title: $100,000 for a Killing
programme.desc: $100,000 for a Killing - Johnny Forest, bounty hunter, attempts to carry out his mother's dying wish that he bring in his outlaw brother, Clint, alive.

programme.title: Sabata the Killer
programme.desc: Sabata and Mangosta are bank robbers, who after a bank job, through a series of events, end up teaming up with the bank clerk, Peter. They then go on the run with Peter's boss and a hired posse equipped with the latest technology in weapons on their trail.

programme.title: Django Meets Sartana
programme.desc: The small desert town of Black City is held in a reign of terror by a nasty gang of criminals lead by the ruthless Bud Willer.

programme.title: HENRY V
programme.desc: The King is persuaded by those around him to claim the Crown of France.

programme.title: Ship That Died of Shame
programme.desc: Based on a short story by Nicholas Monsarrat (author of The Cruel Sea) and directed by Basil Dearden (The Blue Lamp, The League Of Gentleman)

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: Home at Seven
programme.desc: When bank clerk David Preston returns home at seven, his wife tells him that he did not come home at seven, or at any other time, the previous evening. To his amazement, he has no idea where he could have been. There is a complete gap in his memory between the time he left the bank on Monday until his arrival home that following evening. The family doctor is inclined at first to treat it lightly, but during Preston's 24-hour loss of memory, a murder has been committed.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: Ten thousand days ago, Comet 23 struck Earth with the magnitude of all the nuclear weapons in the world sending the planet into a deep freeze. Now, 27 years in the future, those who survived are locked in an epic battle of life or death.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: An aspiring actress working for a courier service gets involved in the disappearance of her colleague right after they win big on the lottery. Starring Amanda Donohoe

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Lacey Farrell, a young rising star on Manhattan's high-powered and competitive real estate scene, must leave her life and join the Federal Witness Protection Program after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth Jennifer comes into possession of an old puzzle box which may contain the key clue in a murder case. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange (2018)

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: Antiques expert and amateur sleuth Jennifer is drawn into another murder mystery when she finds a young woman's body in a storage locker. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange (2018)

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries: One In A Million
programme.desc: The Postables are tasked with finding a letter containing a valuable lottery ticket. Starring Eric Mabius (2016)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A trio of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking they 'll get away with the perfect heist. They 're wrong.

programme.title: The Girl In The Spider's Web
programme.desc: Young computer hacker Lisbeth Salander and journalist Mikael Blomkvist find themselves caught in a web of spies, cybercriminals and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: Percy vs Goliath
programme.desc: Small-town farmer Percy (Christopher Walken) takes on a giant corporation after they contaminate his crops in a desperate war against corporate greed.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: Astronaut
programme.desc: Richard Dreyfuss stars as a lonely widower who lies about his age when entering a competition to win a trip into space

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny and Mickey Lubitch learn that their son, Tod, is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.title: Behind The Line
programme.desc: Occupied France, 1940. A Nazi Commander discovers one of his prisoners, Danny (Sam Gittins) is a champion boxer. He forces him to fight for his companies entertainment.

programme.title: Burying Yasmeen
programme.desc: One man's odyssey to put a ring on his dead ex-wife.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.
